features.name: modport definition inside generate for loop
features.description: Code should include a modport definition placed inside a for (genvar) generate block rather than directly in the interface body

features.name: modport port connections with expressions
features.description: Code should include a modport port connection using expressions (multiple comma-separated signals) rather than simple signal names, such as .creq(req[i], clk, reset)

features.name: parameterized interface with genvar-driven signal widths
features.description: Code should include an interface with a parameter that determines signal array width, used with a genvar index in a generate loop
